hierarchy.h4: text-lg sm:text-xl tracking-tight font-medium uppercase text-neutral-400

typography.custom_instructions: Headings must use Chivo for structured weight. All body text, numbers, metrics, and incident logs MUST use JetBrains Mono to reinforce the terminal/SRE environment. Avoid 'Inter' entirely.

layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Strict, dense hierarchy. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12. Every pixel must be utilized with sharp borders.
layout.spacing: Tight padding (p-4, p-6). Elements must be grouped logically. Use border-collapse patterns or strict 1px grid borders.
layout.borders: 1px solid strokes everywhere. Replace soft shadows with crisp borders. Add 2px inner highlights (box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) for buttons.
layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px - 4px) for interactive elements. No large rounded corners.

cards.style: Flat background (#121212), 1px subtle border (#262626), NO SHADOW. On hover, background shifts to #1A1A1A.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold hover:bg-neutral-200 border-none rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-neutral-700 hover:border-neutral-500 hover:bg-neutral-900 rounded-sm
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/30 hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/20 rounded-sm

badges.style: border rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest uppercase

ai_panel.style: Use 'Retro-Futurism' Terminal look. Background deep obsidian. Subtle CSS repeating-linear-gradient overlay for scanlines. Border glowing softly with AI accent color (muted gold or cyan).

data_tables_and_lists.style: Dense. border-b border-neutral-800 for rows. hover:bg-neutral-900 transition-colors. Text aligns left.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) with faster transitions (0.15s).
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Minimal. Staggered fade-ins for incident feed lists. 'Tracing beam' or typing effect for AI-generated playbooks.

media_and_assets.icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight for legibility in dense UI)

background_texture.instructions: Use with extremely low opacity (opacity-5) and mix-blend-overlay or backdrop-blur in the background of the auth screen or behind the AI reasoning panel to give a subtle textured tech feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. No grey-on-grey unreadable text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='resolve-incident-btn', data-testid='severity-filter-critical'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: JetBrains Mono and Chivo via Google Fonts.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural dashboard grids to achieve the 'Control Room' density, and highly customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs).
Ensure the layout feels like an SRE terminal: dense, dark, strictly bounded by 1px borders, relying heavily on the severity color palette for quick visual parsing.
When rendering AI reasoning or playbooks, use a typewriter or sequential fade-in animation, styled like terminal output.
